rationale: Both papers concern frequency/loyalty programs and psychological drivers, so the 2002 article could plausibly be a foundational theory/mechanism reference. But the citing-paper note identifies its primary extension as Dreze and Nunes (2004), and the matched evidence here is only a bare DOI reference with no local citation context showing direct substantive use. With this limited evidence, it is not safe to drop, but it is not clearly strong enough to keep.
